steps.title: Use the colon definition
steps.content: The colon explains the blank: the historians admired the revolutionaries so much that they were far from objective. The word must describe deep admiration that can create bias.

steps.title: Reject objective attitudes
steps.content: B means honesty and openness, which does not explain admiration-driven bias. C means careful judgment, not excessive admiration. D means a desire to learn, which also does not match the loss of objectivity. Deep admiration fits. The answer is A.
